title: Make Add Comment button interactive with activity timeline integration

requirements.summary: Wire Add Comment button to submit comments to backend and display them immediately in the activity timeline
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Add Comment' submits the comment to the backend
The new comment appears in the activity timeline below the Add Comment button
The comment textarea clears after successful submission
The timeline updates without requiring a page refresh

file_operations.description: Add useAddComment mutation hook that calls actor.addComment with caseId and message, invalidates both 'caseActivities' and 'caseComments' query keys on success to refresh timeline displays
Replace useAddActivity mutation with useAddComment mutation, extract comment text from state, call mutate with caseId and commentText, clear textarea on success, handle loading and error states
Ensure the component displays activities and automatically refreshes when 'caseActivities' query is invalidated after comment submission

requirements.summary: Wire history icon to fetch and populate activity timeline with case comment history
acceptanceCriteria: History icon click loads and displays all comments for the current case
The 'no activity yet' message is replaced with actual comment history when available
Comments are fetched from the backend activities data

file_operations.description: Add history icon button at the top of the section, use useGetCaseComments hook to fetch comments for the caseId prop, toggle display of comment list when history icon is clicked, replace 'no activity yet' message with actual comments or empty state message
Add useGetCaseComments query hook that calls actor.getCaseComments with caseId and returns the comment array, using queryKey ['caseComments', caseId]

requirements.summary: Style comment history with light color-coded blocks, vertical scrolling, and 3-comment maximum view
acceptanceCriteria: Each comment is displayed in a light-colored background block with sufficient contrast
Comments use distinct but subtle color coding for visual differentiation
The comment container scrolls vertically when there are more than 3 comments
Exactly 3 comments are visible at once without scrolling
The scroll behavior is smooth and intuitive

file_operations.description: Wrap comment list in a container with fixed height for 3 comments and overflow-y-auto for scrolling, apply alternating light background colors (e.g., bg-teal-50, bg-gray-50, bg-blue-50) to comment blocks using modulo index, add rounded corners and padding to each comment block, ensure smooth scrolling behavior

requirements.summary: Document visual coding specifications for comment history UI including colors, dimensions, spacing, typography, and scrolling
acceptanceCriteria: Specifications include exact color values for comment blocks
Specifications define container height for 3-comment view
Specifications document padding, margins, and gap spacing between comments
Specifications include typography settings (font size, weight, line height)
Specifications describe scrollbar styling and overflow behavior

file_operations.description: Add detailed JSDoc comment block at the top of the component file documenting: color values (bg-teal-50: OKLCH(0.96 0.02 180), bg-gray-50: OKLCH(0.97 0 0), bg-blue-50: OKLCH(0.96 0.02 240)), container height calculation (3 comments × ~80px + 2 gaps × 12px = ~264px max-h), padding (p-4 per comment block, py-3 between comments), gap spacing (space-y-3 for 12px vertical gap), typography (text-sm 14px, leading-relaxed 1.625, font-normal 400 weight), and scrollbar behavior (overflow-y-auto with smooth scroll-behavior)
